goal: Produce a safe, high-conviction route for healthcare lead growth under tighter platform scrutiny.
assumptions: Evidence-backed hooks outperform aggressive claims in the current review environment.
Response speed on warm leads is a stronger lever than broadening top-of-funnel spend.
primary_route: Case-proof content plus fast warm-lead routing into consultation booking.
alternative_routes: Run low-risk remarketing reactivation before expanding paid acquisition.
priority_order: 1) trust-building content 2) warm lead response speed 3) dormant lead reactivation
risk_tradeoff: Avoid high-claim growth angles; accept lower top-of-funnel volume for higher governance safety.
